text: Artificial intelligence is changing our world, but it also raises important ethical questions. One key issue is bias—AI systems can learn unfair patterns from data, leading to discrimination against certain groups. This is why fairness must be a priority. Developers need to ensure that AI treats everyone equally. Another concern is privacy. AI often collects large amounts of personal data, so protecting that information is crucial. Transparency is also important: people should understand how AI makes decisions. Finally, responsible AI development means thinking about these issues from the start, not as an afterthought. By focusing on ethics, we can build technology that benefits everyone.
